column1: Central America is an isthmus that_______between the Pacific Ocean and the Caribbean Sea. Seven countries________within its boundaries - Belize, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, El Salvador and Panama. (LIE/LIE)
Where is the rug? It__________on the floor yesterday. (LIE)
If he____________on time, I'll bring him to see you. (ARRIVE)
A propeller is a part of an aircraft that____________around very fast and____________the aircraft move. (TURN/MAKE)
Hundreds of years ago many people____________that the Earth___________still and the Sun_________around it. (THINK/STAY/GO)

Copernicus was born in 1473. His father_______a few years after Nicolaus was born. His uncle__________the boy up. He________him to the University of Krakow to study mathematics. There Copernicus also____________the stars and planets. (DIE/BRING/SEND/STUDY)
She switched on the light, she____________the window shut and_____________the blind. (SLAM/PULL)
The boy can't take the dictionary home because it_____________to the school. (BELONG)
He broke the vase when he___________on the wet floor. (SLIP)
Dennise picked up his suitcase and_____________it into the hall. (CARRY)
